description: Surprisingly capable 4B model with hybrid thinking. Great quality for its tiny size.
fullDescription:
## MODEL OVERVIEW
Qwen3 4B is Alibaba's compact model that punches well above its weight class. Despite only 4B parameters, it supports hybrid thinking modes and delivers impressive results rivaling Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct.

## Key Features
- **Hybrid Thinking**: Toggle between fast and deep reasoning modes
- **Compact Size**: Only 2.5GB, runs on almost any hardware
- **Multilingual**: Supports 100+ languages and dialects
- **Tool Calling**: Native function/tool calling support
- **256K Context**: Extended context window for long documents

## Specifications
- Parameters: 4B
- Context Length: 256K tokens
- Default Size: ~2.5GB (Q4_K_M)
- Architecture: Dense transformer

## Use Cases
- Lightweight AI assistant
- Quick Q&A and chat
- Basic coding assistance
- Edge and mobile deployment
- Resource-constrained environments
modelReadme:
Qwen3 is the latest generation of large language models in the Qwen series, offering a comprehensive suite of dense and mixture-of-experts (MoE) models. Built upon extensive training, Qwen3 delivers groundbreaking advancements in reasoning, instruction-following, agent capabilities, and multilingual support.

Even a tiny model like Qwen3-4B can rival the performance of Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct.

## Key Strengths
- Significantly enhanced reasoning capabilities in math, code, and logic
- Superior human preference alignment across creative writing and dialogue
- Expertise in agent capabilities with external tool integration
- Support of 100+ languages and dialects with strong multilingual capabilities
- Hybrid thinking modes: toggle between fast and deep reasoning
name: qwen3-4b
title: Qwen 3 4B
